query: Which visual ablation result is strongest?

gold_required_facts.text: The blue baseline bar is the tallest bar
aliases: The blue bar labeled blue baseline is the tallest
The blue baseline bar is the tallest among the three conditions

gold_required_facts.text: The orange ablation bar is the shortest bar
aliases: The orange bar labeled orange ablation is the shortest
The orange ablation bar is the shortest

gold_required_facts.text: The green recovery bar is between baseline and ablation
aliases: The green recovery bar is taller than the orange bar but shorter than the blue bar
The green recovery bar is intermediate in height

notes: The caption only says outcomes are shown; ranking must be read from the bars.

query: What do the training curves show visually?

gold_required_facts.text: The red accuracy curve peaks at epoch 4
aliases: The red accuracy line reaches its maximum at epoch 4
The red accuracy line reaches its maximum value at epoch 4
The red accuracy line starts at its minimum at epoch 1 reaches its maximum at epoch 4

gold_required_facts.text: The blue loss curve decreases from epoch 1 to epoch 5
aliases: The blue loss line shows a consistent downward trend across all five epochs
The blue loss line starts at its maximum at epoch 1 and reaches its minimum at epoch 5
The blue loss line starts at its maximum at epoch 1 and shows a consistent downward trend to its minimum at epoch 5

gold_required_facts.text: The red curve is higher than the blue curve at epoch 4
aliases: The red accuracy curve is above the blue loss curve at epoch 4

notes: The curve trends and peak epoch are encoded in pixels rather than caption text.
